zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Tracy II於1379年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親William de Tracy I23歲，母親Alice de Baddington22歲。他和Alice de la Spine至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1441年7月在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Tracy II于1379年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，他的父亲William de Tracy I23岁，母亲Alice de Baddington22岁。他和Alice de la Spine至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1441年7月在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Tracy II was born in 1379, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, William de Tracy I, was 23 and his mother, Alice de Baddington, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de la Spine. He died in July 1441, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Tracy II est né en 1379, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Tracy I, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice de Baddington, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de la Spine. Il est décédé en juillet 1441, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Tracy II 1379 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Tracy I 23 und seine Mutter Alice de Baddington 22. Er hatte mit Alice de la Spine mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juli 1441 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Tracy II è nato il nel 1379 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Tracy I, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Baddington, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de la Spine. Morì nel luglio 1441, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Toddington, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Tracy IIが1379年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父William de Tracy Iは23歳，母Alice de Baddingtonは22歳であった。彼はAlice de la Spineとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1441年7月に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Tracy II(이)가 1379년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Tracy I(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Baddington(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alice de la Spine(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 7월 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Tracy II nasceu em 1379, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Tracy I, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Baddington, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Alice de la Spine. Ele faleceu em julho de 1441, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Tracy II родился в 1379 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Tracy I было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Baddington, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Alice de la Spine. Он умер июль 1441 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Tracy II nació en 1379, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Tracy I, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice de Baddington, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Alice de la Spine. Murió en julio de 1441, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
